issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
The resource `R.string.fragment_quotations_selection_all_ascending` appears to be unused

issue.errorLine1: <string name="fragment_quotations_selection_all_ascending_info">\u2022  Start with the Source with the least quotations; end with the Source with the most; any existing Previous is preserved</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_1">\u2022  Sur un écran d\'accueil, appuyez longuement sur un espace vide</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_3">\u2022  Parcourrez les widgets jusqu\'à trouver Quote Unquote</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_5">\u2022  Utilisez le bouton/geste Retour d\'Android pour quitter l\'écran de Configuration et placer le widget sur l\'écran d\'accueil</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_configure_2">\u2022  Les changements sont enregistrés quand vous sortez de l\'écran de configuration avec le bouton/geste Retour</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_configure_4">\u2022  L\'icone \u2316, à coté de l\'indicateur de position de la Citation, indique la dernière précédente Citation</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_configure_5">\u2022  Seule la synchro/l\'import avec le Cloud requiert une connexion à Internet</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_configure_6">\u2022  Revisitez la page des Notifications pour reinitialiser les notifications après le redémarrage de l\'appareil</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_os_warning">\u2022  Certaines versions d\'Android ont une gestion agressive de la mémoire, ajustez l\'appareil en conséquence</string>
issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_resize_instruction_1">\u2022  Tapotez et maintenez le widget sur l\'écran d\'accueil</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="fragment_archive_restore_onto_new_device_info">\u2022  Keeping \'old instance data\' only required if using multiple instances of the app widget on the same device</string>
issue.message: Replace straight quotes ('') with directional quotes (‘’, ‘ and ’) ?
Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/example_appwidget_preview.png` in densityless folder
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image

issue.errorLine1: final SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm.ss", Locale.getDefault());
issue.message: `DateFormat` character 'Y' in YYYY is the week-era-year; did you mean 'y'?
Hardcoded string "1", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Quotation", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Source", should use `@string` resource
When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
